title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
author: J. K. Rowling

setting.note: The Muggle London that hides a wizarding one: a zoo, a pub on Charing Cross Road, a station with a platform that is not there.

rights.originalWork: In copyright. J. K. Rowling, 1997. This book is mapped as a cited work: we store none of its text and reproduce no passages. The places are facts and the notes are our own.
rights.textSource: None stored. A cited book reproduces no text.
rights.territoryNotes: Locations and original commentary only. No reproduction of the copyrighted text, in any territory.
rights.attribution: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone, J. K. Rowling (Bloomsbury, 1997). Locations mapped by Read the Places; not affiliated with or endorsed by the author or publisher.

palette.note: Gryffindor scarlet. A cited book's colour is not a quotation, because we store no text to quote; it still has to be legible, and this clears WCAG AA on paper.
